does anyone know how tentacle crit rate/dmg scales? all I can find is: 
○ Tentacle Crit: Tentacles can crit, with initial crit rate and crit damage equal to 50% of all Awakers' crit rate and crit damage combined upon entering the stage. For each Awaker in the stage, gain 1% crit rate and crit damage, increasing tentacle crit rate and crit damage by 0.25%.
but with manual testing (4 aequors) I get the following crit rates:
15+5+5+7 -> 11
44+5+5+7 -> 27
58+5+5+7 -> 33
58+20+5+7 -> 41
29+20+34+7 -> 41
29+20+34+21 -> 47
73+34+34+36 -> 85
(these are the rounded numbers displayed in-stage)

Hey! Am I correct to assume that I just spend the energy into the event? Except Dissolution ruins and Events, there's nowhere to spend it? Event seems like it gives much more rewards, why would I spend energy into Dissolution ruins? Am I missing smth? <:flop1:1356083604236800030>
Yeah you dont want to spend energy in ruins when event stages are up. Event stages are better especially this one where you get base mats + currency for the shop

Got it, thanks. Also regarding "Special Potion Supply" which restores 120 energy. When is the time to use it? It's my first event and not sure how much of the rewards I'll be able to collect from the shop. Is it like I should use it at the end of the event in case I won't manage to buy smth from the shop?

hard to say because the anniversary event is coming up and don't know if it will be better stamina value. Definitely get the wheel from the shop first as it gives you a currency bonus. Get the wheel, pulls, shards, crystals, seals. Then get whatever you need for your characters skills or levels. when in doubt XP bottles are always good. if you need stuff at the end of the event i would use some stamina refills its not the end of the world
Thanks! That pretty much covered even the next question 😂 Much appreciated!
This is the only wheel in the shop, doesn't say anything about currency bonus. What am I missing <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Go to an event stage, engage it to the team formation stage, and there will be a exclamation mark showing your currency bonus and the rules determining that percentage

That being said, her wheel is amazing on her and quite versatile too, mostly due to having a hand size increase and keyflare main stat, so I would prioritize it over E2
Although, she can function fine without it

Yeh!!
Can always get it to E3 with your monthly dupes later

That will work well for a good part of the content
Definitely get your character roster in order before committing to the wheel jail 
Key enlightenments and a bigger choice of units for DTide bring a lot more value than any +12 standard wheel
Soo....to still pull for E2 Goliath? Hoping for a single unit...might take a lot of summons 😬
Other than that, I have almost no idea what I'll need later, so I ended up pulling nothing but Aequor until E3 Caecus

Anniversary should bring a reset pyramid, so you'll be able to convert one of your standard characters into standard selectors 
Celeste would be great to have, Sanga's copies never hurt, Caecus and Faros can be reset later to put their extra copies to a better use, so you aren't really losing there

Welp, Imma try to get Goliath to E2 then...in the worst case, reset will always be an option at some point and since Caecus is used even in the late content, having extra copies for him even after E3 will never hurt i guess

Well, if you end up pulling too many copies of Caecus, you can simply reset him, bring him back to E2 and then use the rest of the selectors somewhere else <:proud:1400771683664658433> 
-# Or up to E3, if you really-really want it
Overexalts unlocks at +4, correct? Isn't it nice for Caecus to have since his exalt is quite nice?

Yes, 7 extra copies for OE
Doesn't do much in case of Caecus though
The effect is not particularly impressive, and permanent counter stacking stops being relevant in arc 2 ruleset 
Besides, you're using his exalt as your source of vulnerability, and while Caecus does charge it himself with the halberd, he doesn't generate enough to spam OE <:wisdom:1400771656510734356>

Alrighty, thanks. What do I do when I get Goliath to E2 though? Wheel Jail or pulling for other characters? Since I still not sure how reset thing works, but I guess It doesn't allow to get characters you don't own?
Since like in Ultra you mostly need Jenkins/Winkle, but pulling the banner in hopes of getting only those two is questionable

Casiah is up there with those two now too 
And Tinct has her uses too, even if she's niche

That being said, you could consider pulling +12 Blade of the Titan for your Tawil afterwards for the sake of vertical investment in your story comp 
I haven't played Bluewil myself, so have no idea how she performs without GDoll and Hameln
Both are limited awakeners though, so I would need to wait for their reruns anyway after getting enough for Tawil

There isn’t, afaik each covenant set is specific to a singular area with some being stage farms and others being shop buys
Is the game frontloaded with a bunch of silver? Just starting and i want to reroll for tawill but i don't know how far along the campaign to go before pulling
Yeah once you complete story progression is agonizingly slow
oh, is this a rather stingy game when it comes to pulls?
Yeah
After story
pulls decrease a lot

Your average monthly income is 99 standard pulls and 71 limited 
Varied, depending on the events, of course
that doesnt sound bad... unless the average to get the character or wheel is really high
90 hard pity for a limited
Easy to get characters and wheels but you need multiple of them a lot of the time

The average is 42 for the limited character and <30 (don't remember the exact number) for the limited wheel
With hard pity for those being 90 and 60

You do need extra copies for most of the characters, but that is somewhat offset by you getting a copy of universal dupes for both characters and wheels every month
the average per limited character is 42.22 pulls, and the average per limited wheel of destiny is 30
the game is quite generous but *comparatively*, the amount you get passively is much less than than the amount you get from progression via the one-time rewards
just a very minor nitpick, but the exact values are 42.22 (repeating) and 30 on the dot
yeah ~40 and 30 on average doesnt sound bad at all in the context of how many pulls you get per month and then i think of how many copies you need. i think i saw it was 8 right?
42 is common since people just round down 42.22 (which is fine), but I've been seeing weird numbers recently for the limited wheels and I have no idea why or where they came from

3-4 for the majority of the characters
1-2 for some
8 for a few especially greedy ones
I swear people have said 29.5 and 31.5 and it's like ????? because it's a very concrete 30 exact
ok, the numbers of copies dont seem too bad to me if 8 isnt commonly needed
back to tawil, is she one of the greedy ones?

very much depends on the character, but as a general guideline most dps carry characters tend to prefer around 3-4, while some supports are fine at one copy, some supports would like 2-3 but still work fine at one, and some supports really want 3-4
Yes
yes
She can perform at nearly any enlighten lvl tho
Her e1 is the only “absolutely necessary” one

8 is quite rare and realistically is not mandatory outside of, I'd personally say, probably around 2-3 characters in the entire roster (many people will disagree with me, of course, but a lot of progress and power depend strongly on your team options and progression levels as well)
With each following being significant power spikes
e1 so that means getting 2 copies during this banner?
Or getting one copy and using the universal dupe on her, yeh
also note that when people say 8 copies is mandatory, they're always talking specifically about *ultra endgame* team comps which are not relevant whatsoever to newer players or to progression at all
